title: galium aristatum subsp. schultesii
intro: Galium aristatum subsp. schultesii, also known as Schultes' bedstraw, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Galium aristatum subsp. schultesii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems, as well as acting as a natural diuretic and expectorant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used topically to treat skin irritations and wounds.
